---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

One sentence: what would this feature do?

## Problem it solves

What pain point or limitation prompted this idea? e.g. "Currently I have to manually copy-paste between the editor and my own markdown file every time I want to..."

## Proposed solution

How do you imagine this working? A rough description is fine — no need for a full spec.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about, and why you prefer the proposed one.

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, links to similar tools, or anything else that helps explain the request.
